683 GG0170S1_WHEEL_150_STRT_CD GG0170S1_WHEEL_150_STRT_CD Ability to Wheel at Least 150 Feet in Corridor at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to wheel the wheelchair or scooter at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space
